compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add ARCHIVED event type with list/show filtering
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add ARCHIVED event type support end-to-end:
1. `ticket-lib.sh`: Add ARCHIVED to the event_type enum (line 79: CREATE|STATUS|...|EDIT|ARCHIVED)
2. `ticket-reducer.py` `reduce_ticket()`: Handle ARCHIVED event type — when encountered, set `state['archived'] = True` on the ticket state
3. `ticket-reducer.py` `reduce_all_tickets()`: Add `exclude_archived` parameter (default False). When True, filter out tickets where `state.get('archived') == True` from the returned list
4. `ticket-reducer.py` CLI: Add `--exclude-archived` flag for `--batch` mode
5. `ticket-list.sh`: Pass `--exclude-archived` when calling `--batch` mode

## File Impact
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh` (enum addition)
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py` (ARCHIVED handling + filter)
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh` (pass --exclude-archived)
- Modify: `.test-index` (remove RED markers)

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Task 536a-19af tests go GREEN. Existing ticket-list and batch reducer tests remain GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] ARCHIVED in lib enum
  Verify: grep -q 'ARCHIVED' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh
- [ ] reduce_all_tickets has exclude_archived param
  Verify: python3 -c "import importlib.util; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('r','plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); import inspect; assert 'exclude_archived' in inspect.signature(m.reduce_all_tickets).parameters"
- [ ] All archived tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Clarification

ARCHIVED is an event_type (like LINK, SNAPSHOT), NOT a status value. The reducer sets state['archived'] = True as a flag — state['status'] remains 'closed'. This means ticket-transition.sh does NOT need modification and _get_ticket_status in ticket-graph.py continues to work correctly.

No ticket-archive.sh command is created in this story — ARCHIVED events will be written by Story 62eb-dca4 (ticket-lifecycle.sh). Tests create ARCHIVED event JSON files directly.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: ARCHIVED event type added end-to-end. All tests GREEN (archived: 6, list: 16, batch: 10).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
